docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,353.75 FILED BY BURTSAVA, LIANA  TRENDY LIME, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT SCHILLING, ALFRED SCHILLING & CO. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-06-2017 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE $20.00 SERVED FEB-03-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SCHILLING, ALFRED SCHILLING & CO.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BURTSAVA, LIANA  TRENDY LIME, INC. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SCHILLING, ALFRED SCHILLING & CO. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT SCHILLING, ALFRED SCHILLING & CO.
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER-UNDELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED-UNABLE TO FORWARD."

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-06-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-06-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J.BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-06-2017 - JUDGMENT.
